items.name: DENV-Pred-1.0
items.description: The DENV-Pred 1.0 (Dengue, Inhibitor Predictor for Pan-Serotype NS3/NS5, version 1.0) pipeline implements a dual-architecture structure-based machine learning (SBML) framework for identifying pan-serotype inhibitors for Dengue fever.

items.description: multiple machine learning and deep learning practice projects and framework practice repo

items.name: STREAMLIT-DEMO
items.description: Streamlit demo is a simple interactive web application built using Streamlit, a Python framework for creating data apps. It shows how quickly you can turn scripts into dashboards, visualizations, and machine learning interfaces with real-time user interaction.

items.name: FSCTEP
items.description: A Multi-Operator Equivariant Framework for High-Performance Machine Learning Force Fields, supporting External Fields embedding and Physical Tensors prediction.

items.name: PROTON
items.description: Physics-informed Radiation Operator and Time-series Optimized Network. This is a distributed scientific machine learning framework integrating physics-informed neural networks, stochastic quantum diffusion modeling, and spatiotemporal Fourier Neural Operators across a live ESP32 edge sensor mesh.

items.name: TSLA-EDA-ML-Deep-LEarning
items.description: This project presents a comprehensive, end-to-end Machine Learning and Deep Learning framework designed to analyze, model, and forecast Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) stock prices.

items.name: Bihar-Flood-Detection-Early-Warning-System
items.description: A Multi-Model Ensemble Framework for Flood Detection and Early Warning in Bihar using BiLSTM, SAR Imagery, Weather Data, and Machine Learning.

items.name: Manufacturing-Automotive---Contextual-Predictive-Maintenance-IoT-Edge-AI-
items.description: Developed a predictive maintenance framework by fusing IoT sensor data (vibration, current, temperature) with external factors such as weather, traffic, and operational load. Applied ensemble machine learning models to predict equipment failures early, reducing downtime and maintenance costs while improving system reliability.

items.name: refiner
items.description: Refiner by Macrodata Labs, a data processing framework for Machine Learning large scale datasets

items.name: MEDFUSION---Multimodal-Medical-Diagnosis
items.description: MedFusion is a healthcare diagnosis framework that makes disease prediction based on symptom and medical image analysis. It uses both machine learning and deep learning techniques (Convolutional Neural Network). This application assists in early diagnosis through an easy-to-use interface and is meant for educational purposes only.

items.name: tyre-wear-ml-framework
items.description: This repository contains the computational framework developed as part of an MEng Design Engineering thesis at Imperial College London investigating tyre-wear-related non-exhaust emissions using traffic simulation, physics-based modelling, machine learning, and reinforcement learning.

items.name: FIFA-World-Cup-2026-Prediction-Framework
items.description: Machine learning and Monte Carlo framework for FIFA World Cup 2026 prediction using Elo ratings, Poisson goal models, and tournament simulation.

items.name: bare-metal-ml
items.description: A machine learning framework built from mathematical foundations, implementing classical ML algorithms from scratch in Python and C++ without the use of high-level ML libraries. All linear algebra operations, probability distributions, and optimization techniques are derived and implemented manually.

items.name: Data_Science
items.description: This repository showcases my consistent work and commits across Data Science, Machine Learning, and Artificial Intelligence. It includes hands-on implementations, practice problems, and real-world projects using modern tools and frameworks.

items.name: Re-Engage-E-Commerce-Churn-Mitigation-Segmentation
items.description: I used to driven data for e-commerce customer retention framework using RFM segmentation and machine learning to predict churn.

items.name: Explainable-AI
items.description: Explainable AI framework for Parkinson's Disease biomarker discovery using multicohort transcriptomic integration, machine learning, SHAP interpretability, and pathway enrichment analysis of substantia nigra gene expression datasets.

items.name: vnpy-Machine-Learning
items.description: vnpy-Machine-Learning: integrates machine-learning models with the vn.py quantitative-trading framework for AI-driven, data-driven algorithmic trading and backtesting in Python.

items.description: AI-powered framework for cryptocurrency transaction analysis and cybercrime intelligence, combining machine learning, graph neural networks, and behavioral analysis to support digital forensic investigations.

Ademas de base para framework de multientrenamiento, compartacion e inteligencia.

items.name: Learning-Food-Affordability-Representations-to-Predict-Obesity-Diabetes-and-Healthcare-Costs-in-US
items.description: A data-driven ML framework analyzing food affordability across ~3,100 U.S. counties to predict obesity, diabetes, and Medicare costs. Combines autoencoders, PCA, XGBoost, and Double Machine Learning (DML) causal inference via EconML. Identifies a $3.50/meal policy tipping point with simulated savings in billions across 65M Medicare beneficiaries.

items.name: Honeywell-Designathon-Airfoil-Optimization
items.description: A computational airfoil optimization framework integrating CST geometry parameterization, large-scale XFOIL analysis, aerodynamic database generation, and machine learning surrogate modeling for accelerated aerodynamic design exploration.

items.description: Machine Learning assignments and experiments including data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, optimization, and explainability techniques using Python and deep learning frameworks.

items.name: ML-framework-for-SWF-retrieval

Covers end-to-end data preprocessing, EDA, and a full regression pipeline including model selection, feature engineering, HPO, SHAP explainability, and error analysis.

items.description: Designed a swarm-based AI trading framework integrating machine learning, technical analysis, and autonomous agent collaboration for predictive market forecasting.

items.description: sm2rain_hydroai is an AI-enhanced SM2RAIN framework for estimating rainfall from satellite soil moisture. It combines physical inversion with machine learning and deep learning to improve rainfall reconstruction, extreme event monitoring, and hydrologic analysis across climates and regions.

items.name: curriculum_learning_for_bug_detection
items.description: Machine learning approaches for bug detection systems tend to be unstable during the learning process and lack accuracy in dealing with complex code structures, as they are designed to handle all training samples with equal importance without considering their logical difficulty. We propose a curriculum learning framework for Python bug detection

items.name: github-repo-miner
items.description: This framework is developed as a tool to collect source code as inputs and training data for machine learning and deep learning models oriented towards source code analysis.

items.name: Space-Radiation-Tolerant
items.description: Space Labs AI presents: A radiation-tolerant machine learning framework enabling neural networks to operate reliably in space environments. Features adaptive protection, Reed-Solomon error correction, and breakthrough architecture optimizations that improve performance under radiation.

items.description: This study designed and validated a hybrid machine learning framework to optimize predictive lead scoring in the banking sector. The study integrated the K-Prototypes algorithm, efficiently processing mixed CRM attributes to generate a multidimensional latent variable (Cluster_Label).

items.name: PMSM-Thermal-Predictor
items.description: End-to-end Machine Learning framework for thermal prediction and condition monitoring of Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motors (PMSM). Includes data preprocessing, feature engineering, time-series forecasting, anomaly detection, model validation, afor real-time stator winding temperature prediction and predictive maintenance applications.

items.name: Thyroid_Disease_Classification_Feature_Engineering_Ensemble_Learning_XAI_LIME_SHAP
items.description: This project presents a leakage-safe explainable machine-learning framework for five-class thyroid disease classification using Bangladesh clinical data. It combines VT–MI-based feature selection, ensemble classifiers, and SHAP/LIME interpretability to support transparent, reliable, and clinically meaningful decision-making.

items.name: ANN-SVM-Hybrid-Modeling-Framework
items.description: This project is a professional, self-contained machine learning framework for regression modeling on the provided Excel dataset. It hybridizes an Artificial Neural Network (ANN) with a Support Vector Machine (SVM) by using the ANN as a nonlinear feature extractor and the SVM as the final regression model.
